mapper.select: select tsug.group_id ,tsug.group_name, tsug.group_type, tsug.owner_id, tsug.owner_name, tugul.id as link_id, tugul.valid_from, tugul.expire_on, tugul.status from t_sys_user_group tsug join t_user_group_user_link tugul on tsug.group_id = tugul.user_group_id and tugul.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsu.user_id, tsu.username, tsu.nickname, tugul.id as link_id, tugul.valid_from, tugul.expire_on, tugul.create_time, tugul.status, tugul.status from t_sys_user tsu join t_user_group_user_link tugul on tsu.user_id = tugul.user_id and tugul.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsug.group_id, tsug.group_name, case when tugul.user_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_user_group tsug left join t_user_group_user_link tugul on tsug.group_id = tugul.user_group_id and tugul.user_id = #{userId} and tugul.is_deleted = 0 where tsug.is_deleted = 0

select tsu.user_id, tsu.username, tsu.nickname, case when tugul.user_group_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_user tsu left join t_user_group_user_link tugul on tsu.user_id = tugul.user_id and tugul.is_deleted = 0 and tugul.user_group_id = #{userGroupId} where tsu.is_deleted = 0
